---
title: "Pipeline GMIC — Résultats"
subtitle: "Rapport d'inférence sur les sorties de preprocess.py + inference.py"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
jupyter: gmic
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os, glob, pickle, sys, re
import cv2, numpy as np, pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt, matplotlib.patches as mpatches
from IPython.display import Markdown, display as ipy_display

def _find_root(start):
    cur = os.path.abspath(start)
    while True:
        if os.path.isdir(os.path.join(cur, "scripts")) and os.path.isdir(os.path.join(cur, "GMIC")):
            return cur
        parent = os.path.dirname(cur)
        if parent == cur:
            return os.path.abspath(start)
        cur = parent

PROJECT_DIR = _find_root(os.getcwd())
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(PROJECT_DIR, "GMIC"))
OUTPUT_ROOT = os.path.join(PROJECT_DIR, "output")

GMIC_H, GMIC_W = 2944, 1920
VIEWS     = ["L-CC", "L-MLO", "R-CC", "R-MLO"]
CROP_SIZE = 256

# OUTPUT_DIR : variable d'environnement ou auto-detection
raw_param  = os.environ.get("GMIC_OUTPUT_DIR", "")
if raw_param:
    OUTPUT_DIR = raw_param if os.path.isabs(raw_param) else os.path.join(PROJECT_DIR, raw_param)
else:
    # Auto : préférer celui avec predictions.csv le plus récent
    candidates = []
    if os.path.isdir(OUTPUT_ROOT):
        for name in sorted(os.listdir(OUTPUT_ROOT)):
            path = os.path.join(OUTPUT_ROOT, name)
            if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(path, "data.pkl")):
                candidates.append((os.path.getmtime(os.path.join(path, "data.pkl")), path))
    if not candidates:
        raise RuntimeError(f"Aucun dossier valide dans {OUTPUT_ROOT}.")
    with_pred = [(t, p) for t, p in candidates if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(p, "predictions.csv"))]
    OUTPUT_DIR = sorted(with_pred or candidates, reverse=True)[0][1]

CROPPED_DIR = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, "cropped_images")
PKL_FINAL   = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, "data.pkl")
PRED_PATH   = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, "predictions.csv")
SOURCE_FILE = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, "source_dir.txt")
SOURCE_DIR  = open(SOURCE_FILE).read().strip() if os.path.isfile(SOURCE_FILE) else None

def load_u8(path):
    img = cv2.imread(path, cv2.IMREAD_UNCHANGED)
    if img is None: return None
    f = img.astype(np.float32); m = f.max()
    return (f / m * 255).astype(np.uint8) if m > 0 else np.zeros_like(f, dtype=np.uint8)

def first_pid(exam):
    return next((exam[v][0].split("/")[0] for v in VIEWS if exam.get(v)), "?")

# Extraction d'une fonction depuis un script
def _read_script(name):
    with open(os.path.join(PROJECT_DIR, "scripts", name)) as f:
        return f.read()

def extract_func(src, name):
    m = re.search(rf'^(def {name}\(.*?)(?=\ndef |\nclass |\n# ── |\Z)', src,
                  re.MULTILINE | re.DOTALL)
    return m.group(1).rstrip() if m else f"# {name} non trouvée"

PIPELINE_SRC  = _read_script("run_gmic_pipeline.py")
INFERENCE_SRC = _read_script("inference.py")

def show_func(src, name):
    ipy_display(Markdown(f"```python\n{extract_func(src, name)}\n```"))

def show_script(src):
    ipy_display(Markdown(f"```python\n{src.strip()}\n```"))
```

## Dossier analysé

```{python}
#| echo: false
rel = os.path.relpath(OUTPUT_DIR, PROJECT_DIR)
rows = []
for label, path in [
    ("data.pkl",         PKL_FINAL),
    ("cropped_images/",  CROPPED_DIR),
    ("predictions.csv",  PRED_PATH),
    ("source_dir.txt",   SOURCE_FILE),
]:
    exists = os.path.isfile(path) or os.path.isdir(path)
    rows.append({"Fichier": label, "Statut": "OK" if exists else "absent"})

n_imgs = len(glob.glob(os.path.join(CROPPED_DIR, "**", "*.png"), recursive=True))
ipy_display(Markdown(f"**Run** : `{rel}`  —  {n_imgs} images croppées\n"))
ipy_display(pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index("Fichier"))
```

---

## Le pipeline complet (`run_gmic_pipeline.py`)

> Ce script orchestre les deux étapes en séquence : prétraitement puis inférence.
> Pour les lancer séparément : `make preprocess` et `make infer`.

```{python}
#| echo: false
show_script(PIPELINE_SRC)
```

---

## Aperçu des images prétraitées

> Images croppées et redimensionnées à 2944x1920 par `preprocess.py`.
> Pour le diagnostic détaillé du prétraitement, voir `make notebook-preprocess`.

```{python}
#| echo: false
if not os.path.isfile(PKL_FINAL):
    print("data.pkl absent.")
else:
    with open(PKL_FINAL, "rb") as f:
        exam_list = pickle.load(f)

    complete = [e for e in exam_list if all(len(e.get(v,[])) > 0 for v in VIEWS)]
    n_cancer = sum(1 for e in complete if e["cancer_label"]["malignant"])

    ipy_display(pd.DataFrame([
        {"Métrique": "Examens complets (4 vues)", "Valeur": len(complete)},
        {"Métrique": "Cancer",                    "Valeur": n_cancer},
        {"Métrique": "Sains",                     "Valeur": len(complete) - n_cancer},
        {"Métrique": "Images croppées sur disque","Valeur": len(glob.glob(
            os.path.join(CROPPED_DIR,"**","*.png"), recursive=True))},
    ]).set_index("Métrique"))

    demo_cancer = next((e for e in complete if e["cancer_label"]["malignant"]), None)
    demo_sain   = next((e for e in complete if not e["cancer_label"]["malignant"]), None)
    demo_exams  = {k: v for k, v in [("Cancer", demo_cancer), ("Sain", demo_sain)] if v}
```

### Avant / après recadrage

```{python}
#| echo: false
if os.path.isfile(PKL_FINAL) and SOURCE_DIR and os.path.isdir(SOURCE_DIR):
    for lbl, exam in demo_exams.items():
        pid = first_pid(exam)
        fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 4, figsize=(18, 11))
        fig.suptitle(f"Patient {lbl} ({pid}) — Original / Recadré + resize 2944x1920",
                     fontsize=11, fontweight="bold")

        for col, view in enumerate(VIEWS):
            imgs = exam.get(view, [])
            sfp  = imgs[0] if imgs else None
            iid  = sfp.split("/")[1] if sfp else None

            ax_o = axes[0][col]
            img_o = load_u8(os.path.join(SOURCE_DIR, pid, iid + ".png")) if iid else None
            if img_o is not None:
                ax_o.imshow(img_o, cmap="gray")
                ax_o.set_title(f"{view} — Original\n{img_o.shape[1]}x{img_o.shape[0]}", fontsize=9)
            else:
                ax_o.text(0.5, 0.5, "Source absente", ha="center", va="center",
                          transform=ax_o.transAxes, fontsize=9)
            ax_o.axis("off")

            ax_c = axes[1][col]
            img_c = load_u8(os.path.join(CROPPED_DIR, sfp + ".png")) if sfp else None
            if img_c is not None:
                ax_c.imshow(img_c, cmap="gray")
                ax_c.set_title(f"Croppée\n{img_c.shape[1]}x{img_c.shape[0]}", fontsize=9)
            else:
                ax_c.text(0.5, 0.5, "Image absente", ha="center", va="center",
                          transform=ax_c.transAxes, fontsize=9)
            ax_c.axis("off")

        axes[0][0].set_ylabel("Original", fontsize=11, labelpad=10)
        axes[1][0].set_ylabel("Recadrée", fontsize=11, labelpad=10)
        plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
elif not SOURCE_DIR:
    # Afficher juste les croppées
    if os.path.isfile(PKL_FINAL):
        for lbl, exam in demo_exams.items():
            pid = first_pid(exam)
            fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 4, figsize=(18, 5))
            fig.suptitle(f"Patient {lbl} ({pid}) — Images croppées", fontsize=11, fontweight="bold")
            for ax, view in zip(axes, VIEWS):
                imgs = exam.get(view, [])
                img = load_u8(os.path.join(CROPPED_DIR, imgs[0] + ".png")) if imgs else None
                if img is not None:
                    ax.imshow(img, cmap="gray")
                    ax.set_title(f"{view}\n{img.shape[1]}x{img.shape[0]}", fontsize=9)
                else:
                    ax.text(0.5, 0.5, "Absent", ha="center", va="center", transform=ax.transAxes)
                ax.axis("off")
            plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```

### Centres optimaux GMIC

> Croix **rouge** = `best_center` (où GMIC concentre son attention).
> Rectangle **cyan** = patch local 256x256 utilisé par la branche locale du modèle.

```{python}
#| echo: false
if os.path.isfile(PKL_FINAL):
    for lbl, exam in demo_exams.items():
        pid = first_pid(exam)
        cols_data = [(v, exam[v]) for v in VIEWS if exam.get(v)]
        n_cols = len(cols_data)
        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, n_cols, figsize=(5 * n_cols, 8))
        if n_cols == 1: axes = [axes]
        fig.suptitle(f"Patient {lbl} ({pid}) — Centres optimaux GMIC",
                     fontsize=11, fontweight="bold")

        for ax, (view, imgs) in zip(axes, cols_data):
            img = load_u8(os.path.join(CROPPED_DIR, imgs[0] + ".png"))
            if img is None:
                ax.text(0.5, 0.5, "Image manquante", ha="center", va="center",
                        transform=ax.transAxes); ax.axis("off"); continue

            H, W = img.shape[:2]
            ax.imshow(img, cmap="gray", aspect="auto")

            centers = (exam.get("best_center") or {}).get(view, [])
            if centers:
                cy, cx = int(centers[0][0]), int(centers[0][1])
                ax.plot(cx, cy, "r+", markersize=22, markeredgewidth=2.5, label="best_center")
                half = CROP_SIZE // 2
                rx0, ry0 = max(0, cx - half), max(0, cy - half)
                ax.add_patch(mpatches.Rectangle(
                    (rx0, ry0), min(CROP_SIZE, W - rx0), min(CROP_SIZE, H - ry0),
                    linewidth=2, edgecolor="cyan", facecolor="none",
                    label=f"Patch local {CROP_SIZE}x{CROP_SIZE}"
                ))
                ax.set_title(f"{view}\ncenter=({cx}, {cy})", fontsize=9)
                ax.legend(fontsize=7, loc="lower right")
            else:
                ax.set_title(f"{view}\n(best_center absent)", fontsize=9)
            ax.axis("off")

        plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```

---

## Inférence GMIC (`inference.py`)

> L'inférence fait tourner les 5 modèles GMIC en ensemble et moyenne leurs prédictions.

```{python}
#| echo: false
show_func(INFERENCE_SRC, "run_inference")
```

### Résultats bruts

```{python}
#| echo: false
if not os.path.isfile(PRED_PATH):
    rel_out = os.path.relpath(OUTPUT_DIR, PROJECT_DIR)
    print(f"predictions.csv absent. Lancez : make infer OUTPUT_DIR={rel_out}")
    pred_df = pd.DataFrame()
else:
    pred_df = pd.read_csv(PRED_PATH)
    n_pos = int(pred_df["malignant_label"].sum()) if "malignant_label" in pred_df.columns else None
    print(f"Prédictions : {len(pred_df)} examens"
          + (f"  ({n_pos} cancer, {len(pred_df)-n_pos} sains)" if n_pos is not None else ""))
    ipy_display(pred_df.sort_values("malignant_pred", ascending=False))
```

### Métriques et courbe ROC

```{python}
#| echo: false
if not pred_df.empty and "malignant_label" in pred_df.columns:
    y_true  = pred_df["malignant_label"].astype(int)
    y_score = pred_df["malignant_pred"].astype(float)
    y_bin   = (y_score > 0.5).astype(int)
    n_pos, n_neg = int(y_true.sum()), int((y_true == 0).sum())

    if n_pos > 0 and n_neg > 0:
        from sklearn.metrics import roc_auc_score, roc_curve, classification_report
        auc = roc_auc_score(y_true, y_score)
        fpr, tpr, _ = roc_curve(y_true, y_score)

        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(16, 5))

        axes[0].plot(fpr, tpr, color="steelblue", lw=2, label=f"AUC = {auc:.3f}")
        axes[0].plot([0, 1], [0, 1], "k--", lw=1)
        axes[0].set_xlabel("Taux faux positifs")
        axes[0].set_ylabel("Taux vrais positifs")
        axes[0].set_title("Courbe ROC")
        axes[0].legend()

        axes[1].hist(y_score[y_true == 0], bins=20, alpha=0.7, color="steelblue", label="Sain")
        axes[1].hist(y_score[y_true == 1], bins=20, alpha=0.7, color="tomato",    label="Cancer")
        axes[1].axvline(0.5, color="black", linestyle="--", lw=1, label="Seuil 0.5")
        axes[1].set_xlabel("Score malignant_pred")
        axes[1].set_ylabel("Examens")
        axes[1].set_title("Distribution des scores")
        axes[1].legend()

        report = classification_report(y_true, y_bin, target_names=["Sain", "Cancer"], output_dict=True, zero_division=0)
        axes[2].axis("off")
        axes[2].text(0.05, 0.95, "\n".join([
            f"AUC-ROC  : {auc:.4f}",
            f"Examens  : {len(y_true)} ({n_pos} cancer, {n_neg} sains)",
            f"Seuil    : 0.5",
            "",
            "             Precision  Rappel    F1",
            f"  Sain     {report['Sain']['precision']:.2f}       {report['Sain']['recall']:.2f}"
            f"      {report['Sain']['f1-score']:.2f}",
            f"  Cancer   {report['Cancer']['precision']:.2f}       {report['Cancer']['recall']:.2f}"
            f"      {report['Cancer']['f1-score']:.2f}",
            "",
            f"Accuracy : {report['accuracy']:.2%}",
        ]), transform=axes[2].transAxes, fontsize=11, verticalalignment="top",
           fontfamily="monospace",
           bbox=dict(boxstyle="round", facecolor="lightyellow", alpha=0.8))
        axes[2].set_title("Résumé des métriques")

        plt.suptitle("Performance — Ensemble GMIC (5 modèles)", fontsize=13, fontweight="bold")
        plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
    else:
        acc = float((y_true == y_bin).mean())
        print(f"AUC-ROC non calculable (une seule classe). Accuracy : {acc:.2%}")
```

---

## Cas les plus suspects

> Les 6 examens avec le score `malignant_pred` le plus élevé.
> Bordure **verte** = prédiction correcte, **rouge** = erreur.

```{python}
#| echo: false
if not pred_df.empty:
    top_n  = 6
    top_df = pred_df.sort_values("malignant_pred", ascending=False).head(top_n)
    n_cols = min(3, top_n)
    n_rows = (top_n + n_cols - 1) // n_cols
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(n_rows, n_cols, figsize=(5 * n_cols, 6 * n_rows))
    axes = np.array(axes).flatten()

    for i, (_, row) in enumerate(top_df.iterrows()):
        ax    = axes[i]
        img   = load_u8(os.path.join(CROPPED_DIR, row["image_index"] + ".png"))
        score = row["malignant_pred"]
        label = int(row["malignant_label"]) if "malignant_label" in row else -1

        if img is not None:
            ax.imshow(img, cmap="gray", aspect="auto")
        else:
            ax.set_facecolor("#222")
            ax.text(0.5, 0.5, "Image manquante", ha="center", va="center",
                    transform=ax.transAxes, color="white")

        pred_ok = (score > 0.5) == (label == 1) if label >= 0 else None
        color   = ("green" if pred_ok else "red") if pred_ok is not None else "gray"
        for spine in ax.spines.values():
            spine.set_edgecolor(color); spine.set_linewidth(4)

        ax.set_title(
            f"{row['image_index']}\nScore : {score:.3f}  |  "
            f"Label : {['Sain','Cancer','?'][label if label >= 0 else 2]}\n"
            f"{'Détecté' if score > 0.5 else 'Non détecté'}",
            fontsize=9
        )
        ax.axis("off")

    for ax in axes[len(top_df):]:
        ax.axis("off")

    plt.suptitle(f"Top {top_n} examens par score de malignité", fontsize=13, fontweight="bold")
    plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```

---

## Commandes

```{python}
#| echo: false
rel_out = os.path.relpath(OUTPUT_DIR, PROJECT_DIR)
rel_src = os.path.relpath(SOURCE_DIR, PROJECT_DIR) if SOURCE_DIR else "<input_dir>"
print("Relancer le pipeline complet :")
print(f"  make run        INPUT_DIR={rel_src} OUTPUT_DIR={rel_out}")
print()
print("Étapes séparées :")
print(f"  make preprocess INPUT_DIR={rel_src} OUTPUT_DIR={rel_out}")
print(f"  make infer      OUTPUT_DIR={rel_out}")
print()
print("Changer le dossier analysé :")
print(f"  make notebook          OUTPUT_DIR=output/mon_run")
print(f"  make notebook-preprocess OUTPUT_DIR=output/mon_run")
```
